hero.headline: Build Smarter Systems. Scale Faster.
hero.subheadline: We help businesses automate operations, build intelligent software, and launch scalable SaaS platforms designed for measurable growth.

sections.whatTitle: Technology solutions designed for operational growth
sections.whatText: Asman AI designs AI workflow automation, custom software, and SaaS products for teams that need systems they can trust.
sections.techText: We build with proven AI, cloud, CRM, communications, and payments technologies.
sections.processText: A clear delivery model from discovery to launch and support.
sections.pricingTitle: Premium technology packages for serious B2B execution
sections.testimonialsTitle: Practical results across operations, sales, and SaaS systems
sections.ctaText: Request a proposal and define the automation, software, or SaaS system your business needs next.

footer.brandText: Asman AI builds intelligent software solutions that drive real business growth.
footer.newsletterText: Insights on AI automation, software systems, and scalable operations.
footer.legalNotice: Asman AI is a brand operated by ASMAN LLC.

contact.title: Tell us what system you want to build
contact.text: Our team will review your request and respond with the next steps.
contact.formNote: Our team will review your request and respond with the next steps.
contact.brandLine: AI Automation • Software Development • SaaS Solutions
contact.nextText: A structured intake keeps the conversation focused, gives your team clear expectations, and helps us prepare a useful proposal.

form.placeholder: Tell us about your workflow, product, or automation goal.
form.consentPrefix: By submitting this form, you agree to our
form.success: Request received. Our team will review your request and respond with the next steps.

nextSteps: Share the workflow, product, or system you want to build.
We clarify goals, constraints, current tools, and decision criteria.
Our team reviews architecture, integrations, data flow, and delivery risk.
You receive a clear scope, implementation plan, timeline, and investment range.
After approval and payment, onboarding begins and the delivery plan moves into execution.
